overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character walking through a foggy, post-apocalyptic rural town. The character moves from a cluttered workshop yard through boat storage areas, onto a wet main street with abandoned vehicles, and finally onto a winding forest road surrounded by dense evergreen trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered workshop yard with storage equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the cluttered workshop yard past workbenches and storage containers

entered.detail: weathered wooden building with Trade Out signage on the facade
wooden table holding plastic bins and red equipment
large blue plastic drum near the building wall
asphalt surface scattered with yellow autumn leaves

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a cluttered workshop yard behind a wooden building. The ground is concrete covered with fallen autumn leaves. Various storage containers, a workbench, and barrels are scattered around the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: boat storage yard with abandoned vessels

events.description: exits enclosed workshop yard into open boat storage area with muddy ground

agents.ego_description: walking past beached boats and abandoned vehicles toward the main road

entered.detail: large white boat resting on stands in the yard
wooden building with gabled roof visible in the distance
wet dirt surface with puddles and scattered leaves

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide boat storage yard with vessels on stands and abandoned vehicles. The ground becomes muddy and wet. In the distance, a building with Lakeside Resort signage becomes visible as the character approaches the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: small town main street with abandoned vehicles

events.description: steps onto paved road entering the town street area
passes road barricade and continues along the wet street

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt road past abandoned bus and road signs

notable_agents.action: abandoned white bus parked on the side of the road

entered.detail: white and blue transit bus parked on the roadside
flag mounted on a pole near the building
orange and white traffic barriers blocking part of the road
wooden power lines running along the street

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the paved town street, passing an abandoned bus and road barricades. The Lakeside Resort building is visible on the left with an American flag. The wet asphalt reflects the overcast sky as the character continues through the deserted town.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest road with dense evergreen trees

events.description: leaves town behind and enters dense forest road with limited visibility
ambient light decreases as the road curves deeper into the foggy forest

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding road surrounded by tall evergreen trees in foggy conditions

entered.detail: tall pine trees lining both sides of the road
metal barrier along the right edge of the winding road
stone outcropping visible through the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow forest road enclosed by dense evergreen trees. The lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric with fog reducing visibility. The road winds through the wilderness, bordered by a guardrail on one side and rocky cliffs on the other.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered industrial yard through a deserted town and into a dense, atmospheric forest. It begins behind a wooden building in a workshop yard where concrete is strewn with autumn leaves, barrels, and workbenches. As the character moves forward, the space opens into a muddy boat storage yard filled with vessels on stands, leading toward the Lakeside Resort signage in the distance. The scene then shifts onto a wet, paved main street reflecting an overcast sky, passing an abandoned bus and road barricades beside the resort building and an American flag. Finally, the environment transitions from the town into a narrow, winding forest road enclosed by towering evergreen trees and rocky cliffs, where the lighting darkens and thick fog reduces visibility.
